text.title: Micro-MVPs Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Micro-MVPs. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Scope ≤5 dev-days; exceeds = re-cut with the rubric.
rule.rationale: Scope ≤5 dev-days; exceeds = re-cut with the rubric.

rule.statement: One Micro-MVP tests one assumption; multi-risk = split.
rule.rationale: One Micro-MVP tests one assumption; multi-risk = split.

rule.statement: Both kill and success thresholds named before ship.
rule.rationale: Both kill and success thresholds named before ship.

rule.statement: ≥1 Micro-MVP shipped per cycle (2 weeks); 0 = methodology not running.
rule.rationale: ≥1 Micro-MVP shipped per cycle (2 weeks); 0 = methodology not running.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-micro-mvps.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
